inputs.name: main_inout
inputs.desc: Primary stream buffer updated in-place after tile-order sum

inputs.name: aux_scratch
inputs.desc: Secondary stream reused as temporary storage

outputs.name: out
outputs.desc: Tile-ordered sum written back to the primary stream

impl.c_declaration: void add_stream_reorder_2d(float *main_inout, float *aux_scratch, int grid_h, int grid_w, int embed_dim, int merge_size);

notes: Sum two token-major streams and reorder them into merged-tile traversal using the auxiliary stream as scratch.
